results.title: Mandatory learning period and passenger restrictions on the way for province's young motorists as Graduated Driver Licensing approved
results.description: New regulations aimed at reducing the disproportionate number of young drivers involved in fatal and serious traffic collisions in Northern Ireland have received the green light.
